title: Snooze Sequence + Sequence Progress Strip + iMessage Toggle
items: 💤 Snooze Sequence button on every company — pause the entire 30-day sequence for 30/60/90 days or a custom date. Common case: prospect says 'not interested at this time, check back later.' The company re-enters your workflow automatically on the wake date.

On the wake date, a fresh re-engagement sequence dispatches automatically. The first email references the agreed timeframe ('You asked me to circle back in 30 days — checking in as promised') so it doesn't feel like a generic cold restart.
Snoozed-until date appears on every company list row as a blue '💤 Snoozed until Jul 03, 2026' pill so you can see at a glance who's parked.
New '💤 Snoozed' filter chip on the Companies page — one click to see all your parked prospects.
Wake Up Now button on the snooze banner lets you wake a company early if circumstances change.

Per-contact sequence progress strip in the Contacts panel on every company detail — one tiny colored box per step (green=sent, gray=skipped, yellow=paused, blue=snoozed, red=STALLED, orange=task awaiting BDR, blue-outline=up next, white=upcoming). Hover any box for the exact channel + status. Glyphs show the channel (✉ email · 💬 iMessage · 📞 call · in LinkedIn).
Click 'ⓘ Legend' next to the Contacts header any time you need a refresher on what the colors mean.

iMessage channel toggle in Settings → Channels — flip OFF until Blooio is fully linked, and the engine cleanly skips iMessage steps instead of getting stuck. Cleared 1,067 previously-stuck iMessage steps across all tenants in this release.
Disqualify now automatically clears any active snooze on the company (disqualify is terminal and always wins).

title: Floating Dialer + Call Availability Toggle + Notifications
items: Online/Offline toggle switch in sidebar — click to go offline so calls go to voicemail
Floating draggable dialer — drag the call window anywhere, see your CRM while talking
Customizable notification preferences — toggle which events pop up (opens, clicks, replies, hot leads)
Inbound calls now ring in the browser — fixed registration that was preventing calls from connecting
Call completion error fixed for internal/test calls
★ Make Primary button on contacts — one click to change who gets the outreach
✕ Archive button to hide irrelevant contacts without deleting
Smarter primary contact auto-selection — CEOs and directors chosen over technicians
Metro area expansion for autopilot — 48 metros, 467 cities nationwide
Dial pad now shows letters (ABC, DEF, etc) for IVR navigation
What's New changelog — popup on login + full history page

title: Performance + Dashboard Scoping + Campaign Editing
items: 22 database indexes added — pages load 3x faster on Postgres
Dashboard scoped to each BDR — hot leads, activity, KPIs show only their data
BDR filter on My Activity — admins can view any rep's dashboard
Hot Leads by BDR section on Team Overview
Full call log with waveform playback on Team Overview
Campaign edit modal — change daily cap, filters, locations while running
Completed campaigns auto-restart when edited with new criteria
Contact phone backfill — 347 contacts got company main line numbers
Resend webhook fix — email delivery tracking now working

title: Browser Navigation + Deep Links
items: Back button now works — go back to where you were instead of leaving the app
Company pages have shareable URLs — right-click to open in a new tab
Call log on Team Overview with full waveform playback and inline rating
Hot Leads by BDR section on Team Overview
BDR filter on My Activity — admins can view any rep's dashboard
Fixed: Dial a Number now actually connects the call

title: Phone Numbers + Sequence Dates + Performance
items: All contacts now have phone numbers (company main line as fallback)
Sequence steps show calendar dates (e.g. 'Day 5 · May 18')
LinkedIn/call tasks no longer falsely show sequences as 'Stalled'
22 database indexes added — company detail loads 3x faster
Fixed: sequence engine type mismatch that was crashing Postgres every 60 seconds

title: Full 13-Step Sequences + Campaign Editing
items: Autopilot campaigns now create the full 13-step multi-channel sequence (email + call + LinkedIn + iMessage)
Call steps always included — uses company main line when no direct number available
Edit button on campaigns — change daily cap, review filters, locations while running
Completed campaigns auto-restart when edited with new criteria
AI Findability Audit auto-generated for every autopilot prospect
Contact names inferred from email addresses (jake.wozniak@domain → Jake Wozniak)
UTM parameters stripped from website URLs on import

title: Resend Webhook + Deliverability Tracking
items: Email delivery events (delivered, opened, bounced) now tracked from Resend
Domain filter on webhooks — ignores events from other Resend domains
Credit metering fixed for autopilot enrichment

title: Call Recording + Waveforms + Transcription
items: Calls are now recorded with dual-channel audio (rep + prospect separate)
Waveform playback on company timeline and dashboard
Deepgram transcription with speaker labels (Rep vs Prospect)
AI coaching summaries — talk ratio, objections, action items
Call steps auto-complete when a call is logged from the dialer
Star rating and feedback on calls for coaching

title: Sequence Improvements
items: '+ Add Step' buttons between each step in the sequence
Reschedule paused sequences to a future date
'Rework After Call' — AI rewrites follow-ups based on actual conversation
LinkedIn profile link shown directly on LinkedIn sequence steps
Full address shown under company name in detail view

title: Platform Organization + Security
items: Platform settings (API keys, Twilio, custom fields) moved to dedicated Platform page
BDR+ role — can Find Leads, basic BDR cannot
Soft delete — BDR deletions go to admin approval queue instead of deleting
Feedback button — team can submit bugs and feature requests
Timezone picker on profile and user invite
Custom voicemail greeting — upload or record in Settings

title: Hardening + Multi-Tenant Security
items: All direct-ID endpoints scoped to BDR's own data
Sequence engine sends emails as the assigned BDR (not admin)
Dashboard scoped to BDR's companies — hot leads, activity feed, KPIs
Batch selection on Contacts page — bulk delete and power dialer
